scripts.browserstack:check-env: node -e "const missing=[]; if(!process.env.BROWSERSTACK_USERNAME) missing.push('BROWSERSTACK_USERNAME'); if(!process.env.BROWSERSTACK_ACCESS_KEY) missing.push('BROWSERSTACK_ACCESS_KEY'); if(missing.length){ console.error('[BrowserStack] Missing required environment variables for reporting:'); missing.forEach(name => console.error('- ' + name)); process.exit(1); } console.log('[BrowserStack] Environment is configured for reporting.');"
scripts.test:browserstack: npm run allure:clean && npm run browserstack:check-env && cucumber-js --profile browserstack && npm run upload:browserstack
scripts.test:newman: newman run postman/collection.json -e postman/environment.json --reporters cli,junit --reporter-junit-export test-results/newman-results.xml
